title: Patiya Heat Wave
lead: Patiya is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Patiya is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 82%, and the wind speed is 7.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
